list.name: project
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT project FROM sessions ORDER BY project

panels.title: Token Consumption by Project
panels.description: Top 10 projects ranked by total tokens. Identifies which codebases drive the most usage.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens + t.cache_read_tokens + t.cache_creation_tokens) AS total_tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY total_tokens DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Project Activity Over Time
panels.description: Daily token consumption stacked by project. Reveals which projects are active and when.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp) AS time, s.project, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS tokens FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Sessions Per Project
panels.description: Summary table with session count, total tokens, and date range per project. Full path shown in project_path column.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.project, MAX(s.project_path) AS project_path, COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS sessions, SUM(t.input_tokens + t.output_tokens) AS total_tokens, MIN(s.started_at) AS first_session, MAX(s.started_at) AS last_session FROM sessions s JOIN messages m ON m.session_id = s.session_id JOIN token_usage t ON t.message_uuid = m.message_uuid WHERE s.started_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND s.is_subagent = false GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
